‹ GalNet Chronicle
Entity Profile
P

Saskia Landau

Person · First seen 3307-11-25 · 6 mentions
Active: 3307-11-25 → 3308-04-12
Mentions Timeline (6 articles)
3308-04-12
Arissa Accepts Marlinists’ Independence
Emperor Arissa formally recognises the Marlinist Colonies' autonomy with the condition of intelligence collaboration against the NMLA.
3308-01-04
Whistleblower Reveals Imperial Link to NMLA
Captain Saskia Landau reveals a potential link between the NMLA and Imperial Intelligence's Omega Grid.
3307-12-20
Theta Seven's Identity Discovered
ACT reveals Theta Seven's real identity as John Tyburn, a former munitions technician from Baltah'Sine who was radicalised after political persecution, and who commissioned caustic enzyme bomb designs from Liz Ryder without her knowledge.
3307-12-13
The Death of Theta Seven
Theta Seven and his followers sacrifice themselves by destroying the Sacrosanct megaship in Mudhrid, killing thousands of Far God cultists, as ACT confirms the NMLA leader is dead.
3307-12-02
Battle of Mudhrid Ends in NMLA Defeat
The Epsilon Fornacis Empire Group defeats the Neo-Marlinist Order of Mudhrid, with ACT commandos led by Milo Castile retaking the Steel Majesty megaship and preventing Theta Seven's escape.
3307-11-25
The Battle of Mudhrid
The Neo-Marlinist Order of Mudhrid and the Epsilon Fornacis Empire Group declare war in the Mudhrid system, with the NMLA defending Theta Seven aboard the Sacrosanct megaship.
